name: Chocolate Fruit Crispies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: No Guilt Desserts
Combine cereal, raisins, and apricots in a large bowl; set aside. Combine marshmallows, chocolate, and milk in a saucepan. Place over low heat and cook, stirring, about 10 minutes or until melted. Pour over cereal mixture; mix well. Coat a 12x8x2-inch baking pan with cooking spray; spread mixture evenly into pan. Press down firmly using fingers coated with cooking spray. Cover and chill until firm. Cut into 2-inch squares.
